title: Character Packing Code (C)
text: Character Packing Code (C) The C packing code is used for String data types. If specified, fields are stored using the character set specified by the Character Set property of the Entity's Database Interface . If Character Set is set to (default) , the character set is determined by $DEF_CHARSET assignment setting. C n can contain n bytes. Therefore, for characters in a double-byte character set, C n can contain n / 2 characters. There are no special considerations for raw, binary, or variable-length characteristics. Related Links Numeric Strings (C20) The default packing code for the Numeric data type is C20. $DEF_CHARSET Specify the default character set used for storing data in String fields with C packing code.
